# foliate-js vendor

Source: https://github.com/johnfactotum/foliate-js
Commit: 78914aef4466eb960965702401634c2cb348e9b1
License: MIT

This copy is scoped to Yomitomo's EPUB renderer prototype. `view.js` is trimmed to EPUB loading so the app does not bundle unused PDF, MOBI, FB2, or comic-book adapters.
